segments.text: You're definitely living that one, but if you were a little
closer to the corner, it might have been curtains, Light.
Lucky to get away with his life for that one,
or maybe not lucky, but happy.

full_text: is available for Riddles. You're definitely living that one, but if you were a little closer to the corner, it might have been curtains, Light. Lucky to get away with his life for that one, or maybe not lucky, but happy.
